commit_scope: TypeScript joins Python on the source->Form-native execution path: a TS source scanner (shared fsc dialect cursor with 3-char === / !== ops), an expression lifter into TS-BMF-EVAL-* / canonical MATH / COMPARE recipes, and a closure interpreter that walks them to values. CTOR Shape B convergence holds from TS source: a lifted `7 + 3` content-addresses to the same MATH-PLUS Blueprint as the hand-built recipe.

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/form-ontology-loader.fk form-stdlib/engine.fk form-stdlib/compiler.fk form-stdlib/source-compiler.fk form-stdlib/grammars/typescript-bmf.fk form-stdlib/typescript-bmf-eval.fk form-stdlib/tests/typescript-bmf-eval-band.fk

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/form-ontology-loader.fk form-stdlib/engine.fk form-stdlib/compiler.fk form-stdlib/source-compiler.fk form-stdlib/grammars/typescript-bmf.fk form-stdlib/typescript-bmf-eval.fk form-stdlib/typescript-bmf-lift.fk form-stdlib/tests/typescript-bmf-lift-band.fk

cd form && for t in source-corpus-roundtrip-band bmf-generic-language-scanner-band typescript-bmf-reversible-band runtime-real-grammar-capsules-band generic-reverse-emitter-band binary-symbol-lens-band language-bmf-program-core language-bmf-more-constructs language-bmf-expanded-constructs language-bmf-bidirectional; do ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk <preludes-from-header> form-stdlib/tests/$t.fk; done
local_validation.summary: Both new bands three-way green: eval band 28000/28000 (int leaf, canonical MATH binop, const+ident, function+call+return, recursion through the closure self-name to fact(6)=720, arrow-bound-to-const call, op-string BINOP/COMPARE fallback arms), lift band 55000/55000 (precedence, grouping, mod/div, < / === / !==, unary minus, and two CTOR Shape B Blueprint-convergence cells where TS-lifted source node_eq's hand-built MATH-PLUS / COMPARE-LT recipes). All ten existing tests that load grammars/typescript-bmf.fk re-ran three-way green. Teachings landed on the way: the strict TS reader caught compensating paren imbalances Go/Rust silently absorbed; `params` is a reserved reader token in Go/Rust (renamed to pms, matching python-bmf-eval); the shared fsc op table is 2-char only, so the TS dialect prepends === and !== ahead of fsc-common-op2 — held as a 0-arg defn so the grammar still loads without source-compiler.fk (the reversible band's chain caught the eager form).

known_limitations.limitation: The lifter walks expressions only; const/let, function declarations, arrows, and ternaries lift by hand-built recipe (the eval side already walks them).
known_limitations.follow_up: Statement lifting mirroring python-bmf-lift's module walker is the next breath.

known_limitations.limitation: TS strings, floats, bools, objects, and arrays do not lift or eval yet; EVAL-PASS names unsupported tokens honestly with a trace.
known_limitations.follow_up: Rides the intrinsic-casting design for Form primitive types.

ci_validation.summary: PR gates run kernel parity three-way.

deploy_validation.summary: form-stdlib rides the api rebuild; no route changes.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: No route changes. TypeScript expression source now walks to values through the same Form-native scan -> lift -> eval shape Python uses, with Blueprint convergence proven from source.
test_flows: Two bands three-way across Go/Rust/TS kernels; full validate.sh sweep.
e2e_validation.summary: validate.sh exit 0 on both band workloads.

phase_gate.gate: TS expression round-trip proven three-way with Blueprint convergence
phase_gate.next: statement lifting + intrinsic casting for bool/int/float/string primitives
